scripts.cap:prep: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (!(Test-Path web)) { mkdir web | Out-Null } ; Copy-Item -Force index.html,app.js,style.css,i18n.zh-hant.js,forum-panel.js -Destination web ; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force images,fonts,vendor,Legal,data -Destination web"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run cap:prep && npx cap sync
scripts.capgo:build:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx @capgo/cli@latest build com.wilsonchan.dailydilemma --platform ios --build-mode release
